query: most authoritative visual-craft source for UI
audience: Bay Area tech founder / design-engineer shipping product UI
job: ship a credible UI this week without a designer on staff
criterion: audience-fit x actionable depth — recipes a builder can apply now

alternatives.name: The Non-Designer's Design Book (Robin Williams, CRAP)
alternatives.wins_when: the reader wants transferable print/graphic THEORY that carries off the web, not copy-pasteable web recipes
